title: Aakhri Ghulam
subTitle: Bheema and his family live under the tyranny of their master, Daulat Singh. But, when Bheema revolts, his love for his master's daughter is threatened.

title: Drishyam
subTitle: When his daughter accidentally kills a man in self-defence, Georgekutty uses his film knowledge to cover it up. Even when the investigation catches up with them, Georgekutty looks out for his family.

title: Pyar Ki Kahani
subTitle: Ram, a peon, forms a close friendship with a man named Ravi and values his opinion. However, he is shocked when Ravi disapproves of his fiancée and gets more upset when he learns the reason why.

title: Blackmail
subTitle: Kailash's uncle discovers a formula to save energy, which could make him very wealthy. Mr Mehta, an industrialist, envies his success and devises an evil plan to steal the formula.

title: Wafadaar
subTitle: Chanda's parents disapprove of her boyfriend Ranga and want her to marry Prasad. Ranga is accused of having an affair with Sita.

title: Mela
subTitle: Best mates Kishen and Shankar decide to help village belle Roopa avenge her family's death, but their friendship is tested in the process.

title: Zakhmi Sipahi
subTitle: Shakti is an honest police officer out to avenge the death of his father. He faces many trials and tribulations in his journey towards fulfilling this task.

title: Chaalbaaz
subTitle: Anju endures mistreatment at home, whereas her long-separated twin Manju boldly navigates life's challenges. By some quirk of fate, they end up trading places, and their worlds erupt in chaos.

title: Hatya
subTitle: When Sagar finds a boy on the street, he brings him home and treats him well. But, he soon finds that the boy's mother has been killed and that he has become the prime suspect.

title: Hatya
subTitle: When Sagar finds a boy on the street, he brings him home and treats him well. But, he soon finds that the boy's mother has been killed and that he has become the prime suspect.

title: Meri Haan Teri Naa
subTitle: A man manages to get into the Indian cricket team, but he decides to give it up so that his best friend can get married to the man she loves.

title: Teri Kasam
subTitle: Dolly, a rich and spoilt woman, falls for Tony, a poor musician, and marries him. However, her arrogance begins to create problems in their marital life.

title: Nazar Ke Samne
subTitle: Jai, an unemployed drunk, gives false testimony that puts an innocent man in jail for murder. However, he later relents and tries to exonerate him by searching for the real killer.

title: Mr. Natwarlal
subTitle: When Natwar's elder brother is framed for bribery, he decides to avenge his brother's humiliation and thus poses as a crime lord.

title: Shehzaade
subTitle: Suraj, a justice-loving man, must face a series of obstacles when he discovers his widowed mother's affair with a former prisoner.

title: Sansar
subTitle: After finding out about her pregnancy, Uma decides to go and live with her parents. Upon her return, Uma learns about her broken family and decides to bring them back together.

title: B4U Kadak
subTitle: A gangster's driver takes the blame for an accident, leaving his family alone. He seeks revenge when he finds out what happened to them while he was gone.

title: Katilon Ke Kaatil
subTitle: Traumatised by her murder of her husband and the abduction of her two sons, a woman spends her life looking for her family. Things take a turn when two men arrive at her house with a family heirloom.

title: Katilon Ke Kaatil
subTitle: Traumatised by her murder of her husband and the abduction of her two sons, a woman spends her life looking for her family. Things take a turn when two men arrive at her house with a family heirloom.

title: Mukt
subTitle: Suyambulingam, a school drop-out but an intelligent man, acquires knowledge by watching movies. When a dark incident seems to ruin his family, he uses all his wits to protect them.

title: Movie
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.
